case_title: PENHALL COMPANY VS TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO RICHARD DORAIS (TURNER CONST) RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO. HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,835.50 FILED BY PENHALL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENHALL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO. $2,835.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,855.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-26-1993, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENHALL COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
